standup.name: Smit Parekh
next: Live click-through verification of the notification panel (admin + employee roles)
Backend scheduler fix for duplicate meal/workflow notification emits

tasks.name: Notification panel redesign
tasks.body: Grouped duplicate notifications into a soft-card panel with date sections and expandable history.
tasks.summary:
- Group duplicate notifications by title+message+day+referenceId with an xN count badge
- Added Today/Yesterday/Earlier sections and soft-card styling with an unread accent bar
- Made grouped cards expandable, showing each occurrence's exact date+time and read state
- Built an interactive HTML prototype (3 style variants) for design sign-off

tasks.name: Offboarding notification routing fix
tasks.body: Fixed offboarding notifications linking to a non-existent route and mapped all offboarding types.
tasks.summary:
- Replaced non-existent /offboarding/exit/:id (404) with /exit-process?exitId=:id
- Mapped all offboarding notification types (manager decision, exit revert, F&F, experience/relieving letters, meeting, exit completed) that had no link
- Verified backend needs no change: notify() stores only referenceId and builds no URL
- Removed the dead resolveHref/myExit code path

tasks.name: Requests hub error surfacing & responsive fix
tasks.body: Surfaced backend error messages in the requests hub and made it responsive.
tasks.summary:
- Surface backend error messages to the user instead of generic failures
- Made the requests hub layout responsive
- Corrected apiErrorMessage comment formatting
